text/brand.description: Branded text accent — themed callouts, signatures. Use sparingly.

elevation/compact/rest.description: Compact raised surface at rest — cards, dropdowns, popovers.

Type.description: Visual type — affects CSS styles only. Becomes a className-based prop.

summary.slots: left-icon (icon, optional), arrow-left (icon, optional), title (text, optional), right-icon (icon, optional), cart (icon, optional)

summary.when: Use to group related content in a contained surface.

screens.name: Payment
screens.layout: 402px × 874px; vertical flex; gap: 0px; align: start; justify: start; min-height: 874px; background-color: #ffffff; border-radius: 0px; box-shadow: var(--effect-style-cards-normal)

tree.name: Header
tree.layout: fill × 60px; horizontal flex; gap: var(spacing/stack/sm); padding: 0px var(padding/button/vertical); align: center; justify: start

children.name: Top bar
children.layout: fill × hug; horizontal flex; gap: 16px; align: center; justify: start; flex-grow: 1

children.style: color: #fdfdfd; font-family: "Post Office Digital HL", sans-serif; font-size: 24px; font-weight: 600; line-height: 140%
